text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Huh?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Sensing something strange, I open my eyes to find
myself in bed of an unfamiliar hospital room. Did
something hap—

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Oh, Trainer! Don't get up too fast!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
You really messed up your back. Do you
remember? We were on our way to the airport,
when...

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Thanks for coming with me, Trainer! This is a
direct train, so we'll be there in no time!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
My dad's next flight is this evening, so we won't
have much time, but...

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
We can only see each other a few times a year, so
we've got tons to talk about!
choice_data_list:
Then maybe it would be best for me to leave
you two alo—

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Don't be silly! I wanna introduce you to him! Plus,
he said it would be dangerous for me to go alo—

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Oh! Could you move closer a little? There's an old
lady trying to get past.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
There's an older woman with a suitcase standing
behind me. I hurriedly move out of the way so she
can get through.

text_block_list.name: Older Woman
text_block_list.text:
Thank you. I was having trouble holding onto the
hand strap with this big suitcase...
choice_data_list: I can put it on the luggage rack for you.

text_block_list.name: Older Woman
text_block_list.text:
Oh my, you're so kind. But it's far too heavy, so
don't—

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Crack!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: ...Huh? Trainer? Was that you?

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: T-Trainer?!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
You lost consciousness from the pain, so we
called an ambulance.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
I didn't go to see him! I couldn't just leave you on
your own...
choice_data_list: I'm fine! You get to the airport!
I'm fine! You get to the airport!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: It's okay! I already apologized to him.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
I'm gonna stay here today and nurse you back to
health!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Hey! I said it's fine! Now you just lie down and let
me do my thing!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
I've been studying how to be a real grown-up
woman, so I'll be the perfect nurse! Check this
out...

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Pain's gotta flyyy like an eagle... Go away! ☆
Pain's gotta flyyy like an eagle... Let Maya have
her way! ☆

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Well? It doesn't hurt anymore, right? You're
welcome! Now...

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: It's time for lunch! Since you can't move...

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: I'll feed you myself! ♪ Say "ah"!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Okay! Now it's time to rest. I'll count planes with
you.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
One F-1... two F-2s... Oh, have I told you that the
plane my dad pilots is a—

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Oops, I got distracted! I have to lull you to sleep!
Okay, once more!
choice_data_list: I really think you should go see your dad...

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
You know... I really look up to him and love him a
lot, right?

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
But... I want you to know that you're precious to
me too.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
I need you to be healthy so you can stand by my
side and twinkle on with me.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Lemme help you! You always support me, so I
wanna do the same for you.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
I'll stay right by you. Just relax and rest... That's
all I'm asking for.
choice_data_list:
Okay then. I'll be back on my feet before you
know it.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
I'll stay right by you. Just relax and rest... That's
all I'm asking for.
choice_data_list:
Okay then. I'll be back on my feet before you
know it.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Yeah! You'd better be!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
I was really worried about you. You suddenly fell
over and looked like you were in so much pain... I
was so scared.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Sniffle... You're not allowed to collapse all of a sudden like that again. If that ever happens...

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
It'd better be because I've made your heart beat
so hard you're having a heart attack!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Just kidding! Ehehe...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Thanks to Mayano's devoted nursing, the pain in
my back goes away, and I'm discharged from the
hospital.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Hehe! Leave the rest of your healing to me! I'll get
you back in perfect shape!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Oh, I totally forgot! I spoke to my dad on the
phone earlier. He said he wants to meet you the
next time we have a chance.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
He sounded super serious! I was shocked! He only
ever speaks to me really gently.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: So you have to heal right up, okay?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm already feeling nervous wondering how I'm
supposed to act in front of him... Still, I take the
time to heal and am discharged without incident.
